//: Copy this file to your project repo root as .harness.json and fill in the values. It is the per-project contract mango reads at runtime. SECRETS/TOKENS DO NOT BELONG HERE: keep them in a gitignored .env. .harness.json itself is gitignored by mango's marketplace, but treat it as committed project config — never paste credentials into it.
test_command: REPLACE_ME (e.g. the single command that runs your test suite or a focused subset)
pr_host: REPLACE_ME (e.g. the host/command used to open a pull request)

tracker.cli: REPLACE_ME (CLI command for ALL tracker writes — comments, transitions; never an MCP)
tracker.read_mcp: REPLACE_ME_OR_NULL (optional read-only MCP server name for ticket READS only)
